title: Job requirements extracted from a JD

keywords.description: Verbatim or near-verbatim phrases from the JD that a literal ATS would search for.

variants.description: Accepted equivalents for the ATS keyword-presence check (e.g. 'K8s' counts for 'Kubernetes').

description: Written by the brain (via `python -m matchbox.jobreqs save`). Cached in job.requirements_json with a model_version tag. The matching pipeline scores each library component against each requirement.

model_version.description: Identifier for the model/prompt that produced these requirements. Changing this triggers a clean recompute of cached vectors.

jd_hash.description: SHA-256 of the JD text the brain extracted from. Lets the app detect a stale cache when the JD is edited.
